endpoints.name: GET /groups
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of groups defined within a service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /groups/{groupId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the group specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid.

endpoints.name: PUT /groups/{groupId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /groups/{groupId}
endpoints.description: Deletes specific group of the API Management service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /groups/{groupId}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of the group specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid.

endpoints.name: GET /groups/{groupId}/users
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of the members of the group, specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid.

endpoints.name: PUT /groups/{groupId}/users/{uid}
endpoints.description: Adds a user to the specified group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{UID}} with a real uid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /groups/{groupId}/users/{uid}
endpoints.description: Remove existing user from existing group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{UID}} with a real uid.
